reference: I recently had a stent placed in my left carotid artery and am on Clopidogrel. I have developed a sizable bruise on my forearm which has a hard knot in the center of it. Do I need to see my doctor about this, or will it just go away? Could it be a blood clot even though I am on a blood thinner?
text: I've recently had a stent placed in my left carotid artery and, among clopidogrel, I have developed a sizable bruise on my forearm which has a hard knot in the center of it. Do I need to see my doctor about this, or will it just go away? Could it be a blood clot, even though I am on a blood thinner?
